programme.title: You, Me and Dupree
programme.desc: A jobless bachelor wears out his welcome after his newlywed pal invites him to move in temporarily.

programme.title: This Is 40
programme.desc: A long-married couple (Paul Rudd, Leslie Mann) deal with personal and professional crises.

programme.title: Blockers
programme.desc: Three parents try to stop their daughters from losing their virginity on prom night.

programme.title: Night School
programme.desc: A man deals with misfit students and a feisty teacher while attending night school to get his GED.

programme.title: Kicking & Screaming
programme.desc: A father (Robert Duvall) and son (Will Ferrell) go head-to-head as soccer coaches.

programme.title: You, Me and Dupree
programme.desc: A jobless bachelor wears out his welcome after his newlywed pal invites him to move in temporarily.

programme.title: Child's Play 2
programme.desc: A boy (Alex Vincent) has a rematch with Chucky the killer doll.

programme.title: Child's Play 3
programme.desc: Chucky the killer doll wreaks havoc when he is mailed to his young foe's coed military school.

programme.title: Bride of Chucky
programme.desc: Animated by a vicious killer's spirit, a battered doll and its mate seek help to regain human form.

programme.title: Seed of Chucky
programme.desc: The doll (Brad Dourif) and his bride (Jennifer Tilly) try to raise a killer child (Billy Boyd).

programme.title: Curse of Chucky
programme.desc: Vengeful Chucky, the killer doll, infiltrates the family of two sisters and one's little girl.

programme.title: Cult of Chucky
programme.desc: Chucky returns to terrorize his human victim, Nica. Meanwhile, the killer doll has scores to settle.

programme.title: Child's Play 2
programme.desc: A boy (Alex Vincent) has a rematch with Chucky the killer doll.

programme.title: Child's Play 3
programme.desc: Chucky the killer doll wreaks havoc when he is mailed to his young foe's coed military school.

programme.desc: Animated by a vicious killer's spirit, a battered doll and its mate seek help to regain human form.

programme.desc: The doll (Brad Dourif) and his bride (Jennifer Tilly) try to raise a killer child (Billy Boyd).

programme.desc: Vengeful Chucky, the killer doll, infiltrates the family of two sisters and one's little girl.

programme.title: Bride of Chucky
programme.desc: Animated by a vicious killer's spirit, a battered doll and its mate seek help to regain human form.

programme.title: Bring It On
programme.desc: Champion cheerleaders (Kirsten Dunst, Eliza Dushku, Jesse Bradford) compete against an urban squad.

programme.title: Bring It On Again
programme.desc: College cheerleaders (Anne Judson-Yager, Faune A. Chambers) compete against the varsity team.

programme.title: Bring It On: All or Nothing
programme.desc: A teen (Hayden Panettiere) must win over the head cheerleader to make the squad.

programme.title: Bring It On: Fight to the Finish
programme.desc: A teen (Christina Milian) clashes with a cheerleading captain at her new school.

programme.title: Bring It On: In It to Win It
programme.desc: A high-school senior (Ashley Benson) falls for a rival cheerleader (Michael Copon).

programme.title: Bring It On: Worldwide #Cheersmack
programme.desc: Destiny leads The Rebels in a virtual cheer competition after a rival team challenges them.

programme.title: Bring It On
programme.desc: Champion cheerleaders (Kirsten Dunst, Eliza Dushku, Jesse Bradford) compete against an urban squad.

programme.title: Bring It On Again
programme.desc: College cheerleaders (Anne Judson-Yager, Faune A. Chambers) compete against the varsity team.
